issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage.
Examples are Python-only, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B on customer support transcripts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uploads JSONL via client.files.upload then calls client.fine_tuning.create with training_file, model=meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-Reference, n_epochs, suffix; baseline tends to describe generic OpenAI fine-tuning and misses Together's specific SDK call and Reference-model naming.

scenarios.name: Swap from OpenAI to a Together-hosted Llama 3.1 70B Turbo model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment keeps the OpenAI SDK and changes base_url to https://api.together.xyz/v1 with model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct-Turbo and the TOGETHER_API_KEY env var; baseline often suggests rewriting to a different SDK rather than using the documented OpenAI-compatible base_url swap.
